chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitution Petition No. 1114 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For order on office objection No. 18. 2. For hearing of CMA No. 4636/21 (stay) 3. For hearing of main case. -------------- 09.08.2024. None present for the Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, Advocate for Respondent. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. ---------- None present on behalf of the Petitioner nor any intimation received. It appears that the precise case of the Petitioner is that an appeal is pending before the Customs Appellate Tribunal, which at the relevant time, was non-functional. However, as of today, the Tribunal is functional. In view of above, the petition is disposed of by directing the Customs Appellate Tribunal to decide the pending appeal of the Petitioner preferably within a period of 60 days after affording opportunity of hearing to all concerned. Let a copy of this order be issued to the Customs Appellate Tribunal, Karachi. J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz
